# Planted-violation sample for tests/test_model_agnostic_config_boundary.py.
#
# NOT real source. The .txt extension keeps it out of pytest collection, ruff,
# and the runtime tree the guard actually scans. The guard self-test parses
# this content directly to prove it CATCHES introduced violations while
# ignoring comments, docstrings, and prompt-template constants.
#
# This comment names gpt-4o and api.openai.com and must NOT be flagged
# (comments are not in the AST at all).
"""Module docstring naming claude-3-opus must NOT be flagged (docstrings are stripped)."""

# Three genuine violations the guard MUST catch:
EVIL_DEFAULT_MODEL = "gpt-4o-mini"            # model-identifier
PROVIDER_BASE_URL = "https://api.openai.com/v1"  # llm-base-url


def pick(provider):
    if provider == "anthropic":               # provider-selection-literal
        return provider
    return "fallback"


# Must NOT be flagged: a *_PROMPT constant legitimately names example models.
EXAMPLE_PROMPT = "Extract model names like gpt-4o and gemini-2.0-flash from the content."
